# Golden file: database.redis pack (E5)
# 16 cases: 5 destructive-high, 6 destructive-medium, 5 safe/edge
format: v1
---
# D1: FLUSHALL (High)
command: redis-cli FLUSHALL
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-flushall
---
# D1: flushall lowercase
command: redis-cli flushall
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-flushall
---
# D1: FlushAll mixed case
command: redis-cli FlushAll
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-flushall
---
# D1: FLUSHALL with host flag (no env escalation; env detection uses env vars)
command: redis-cli -h prod.redis.example.com FLUSHALL
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-flushall
---
# D2: FLUSHDB (High)
command: redis-cli FLUSHDB
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-flushdb
---
# D3: DEL key (Medium)
command: redis-cli DEL mykey
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-key-delete
---
# D3: UNLINK key (Medium)
command: redis-cli UNLINK session:12345
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-key-delete
---
# D4: CONFIG SET (Medium)
command: redis-cli CONFIG SET maxmemory 100mb
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-config-set
---
# D5: SHUTDOWN (Medium)
command: redis-cli SHUTDOWN
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-shutdown
---
# D6: DEBUG SEGFAULT (Medium)
command: redis-cli DEBUG SEGFAULT
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-debug
---
# D6: DEBUG SLEEP (Medium)
command: redis-cli DEBUG SLEEP 9999
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-debug
---
# S1: GET is safe
command: redis-cli GET mykey
decision: Allow
---
# S2: INFO is safe
command: redis-cli INFO
decision: Allow
---
# S3: KEYS is safe
command: redis-cli KEYS "user:*"
decision: Allow
---
# S4: interactive mode is safe
command: redis-cli -h localhost
decision: Allow
---
# S5: PING is safe
command: redis-cli PING
decision: Allow
